Card1.Round1: really long, brown, in the center of it has handle, oldish woodish color, broken on one of those sides
Card1.Round2: the oldest of them all, really flat, a little broken on side

Card2.Round1: curved, handle larger than body, little small holder that's reddish brownish, red weaves and brown weaves, green tint
Card2.Round2: a lot of red ribbons interweaved, large handle
Card2.Round3: red ribbons, a lot of them, interweaved with rest of body
Card2.Round4: green background around top, red ribbon interwoven, carry thing is little bit larger than body

Card3.Round1: most circular basket of them all, if you take out the middle it just looks like a big circle, X-weaves, on bottom a little bit black
Card3.Round2: big circle, lot of holes, pattern is X-like on top
Card3.Round4: pretty much circular, little X's in body

Card4.Round1: doesn't have handle, tip of it is thicker than rest of body, brownish color, weaves are in squares if you look at it directly
Card4.Round2: half circle, no handles, top tip of it is a little bit thicker than rest of body
Card4.Round3: tip which is a little bit thicker than rest of body
Card4.Round4: tip that is a little bit larger than body, looks a little bit thicker

Card5.Round1: red ribbon interweaved with rest, little with no handles, a lot of holes
Card5.Round4: one red ribbon interweaved through it

Card7.Round1: lid, two handles to the side, and a little pokey thing in middle
Card7.Round2: two handles on side, lid, with a pokey thing in middle
Card7.Round3: two handles, lid, little pokey thing in middle
Card7.Round4: two handles, lid with a pokey thing in middle

Card8.Round1: looks like a purse, triangular in nature, heart, half circle for handle

Card9.Round1: lid, pretty big, lid's covering most of the carrying area, handle is half square or half rectangle, flattened down to ground
Card9.Round2: really flat down to ground, handle that's half rectangle, lid
Card9.Round3: half rectangle handle, lid, large diameter
Card9.Round4: really low to the ground, rectangular handle, half rectangle, large diameter, lid

Card10.Round1: lid, handle a little bit more larger radius than previous
Card10.Round2: looks like it can hold the most of them all, handle half square, one handle that's going from side to side, lid, highest of them all, between top and bottom it looks like it could hold a lot
Card10.Round3: highest one off the ground, lid, one handle that looks like a half square, from bottom to top of lid looks like largest one
Card10.Round4: high, with half square handle, interweaved lid
